scores.correctness_notes: The agent describes events from the older tls-certificates charm library (certificate_expiring, certificate_invalidated, all_certificates_invalidated, v3/v4 API) rather than the current charmlibs-interfaces-tls-certificates v1 library. The gold standard specifies only CertificateAvailableEvent and CertificateDeniedEvent. The when-to-request guidance partially overlaps (revocation) but misses the request_errors/CertificateDeniedEvent pathway.
scores.hallucination_notes: The events described (certificate_expiring, certificate_invalidated, certificate_creation_request, all_certificates_invalidated) do exist in older versions of the charm library, so they are not fabricated. However, they do not belong to the charmlibs v1 interface being asked about. Minor inaccuracy rather than outright hallucination.
